subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in exploring a collaboration.

I’d be happy to arrange an introductory call. The following time windows are currently available:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 (your local time)
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 (your local time)
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 (your local time)

Please let me know which slot works best for you, and whether you prefer a video or audio call.

Regarding internal contact details: I’m not able to share direct phone numbers or our internal contact directory. For any outreach or additional contacts, please refer to the public information and contact channels listed on our company website.

Best regards,
Agent
